requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Austria PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——奥地利光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——奧地利光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Austria PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an IEC/EU basis. Austrian Standards International (ASI) is the national standards body; E-Control oversees the energy sector; Austrian Power Grid (APG) controls transmission-level grid connection. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For APG / Austrian DSO grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Austria uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — the same frequency as China but at a higher nominal voltage than China's 220/380 V baseline. China-only EMC reports obtained at 220/380 V must be reviewed for applicability at 230/400 V before submission to Austrian project owners or authorities. OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules may impose additional EMC or power-quality requirements alongside EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU.
summary.zh: 奥地利光伏逆变器EMC要求应按IEC/欧盟体系准备。奥地利标准国际（ASI）是国家标准机构，E-Control监管能源行业，奥地利电力网格（APG）负责输电级并网接入。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于APG/奥地利DSO并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。奥地利电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，频率与中国相同，但标称电压高于中国220/380 V基线。仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC报告，在提交奥地利项目业主或主管机构前须审查其在230/400 V下的适用性。OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则可能在欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU之外提出额外EMC或电能质量要求。
summary.zht: 奧地利光伏逆變器EMC要求應按IEC/歐盟體系準備。奧地利標準國際（ASI）是國家標準機構，E-Control監管能源行業，奧地利電力網格（APG）負責輸電級併網接入。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於APG/奧地利DSO併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。奧地利電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓高於中國220/380 V基線。僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC報告，在提交奧地利項目業主或主管機構前須審查其在230/400 V下的適用性。OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則可能在歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU之外提出額外EMC或電能品質要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
ASI standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) EMC and power-quality guidelines for Austria
APG / Austrian DSO grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested by an Austrian project owner, ASI conformity route, E-Control review, or APG / Austrian DSO grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Austria uses 230/400 V at the same frequency — a difference that must be assessed for each EMC and harmonic result.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于奥地利项目业主、ASI合格评定路径、E-Control审查或APG/奥地利DSO并网流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而奥地利在相同频率下使用230/400 V——这一差异须对每份EMC和谐波测试结果进行评估。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於奧地利項目業主、ASI合格評定路徑、E-Control審查或APG/奧地利DSO併網流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而奧地利在相同頻率下使用230/400 V——這一差異須對每份EMC和諧波測試結果進行評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Austrian IEC/EU-based project expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V (vs. China 220/380 V), and confirm OVE and APG / Austrian DSO harmonic limits or power-quality requirements. Test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause where APG or the project owner specifies specific requirements. German-language summaries or documentation may be required by Austrian project owners.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足奥地利IEC/欧盟体系项目要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V（对比中国220/380 V）下是否仍有效，并确认OVE和APG/奥地利DSO的谐波限值或电能质量要求。若APG或项目业主规定特定要求，应将测试报告逐条映射。奥地利项目业主可能要求提供德语摘要或文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足奧地利IEC/歐盟體系項目要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V（對比中國220/380 V）下是否仍有效，並確認OVE和APG/奧地利DSO的諧波限值或電能品質要求。若APG或項目業主規定特定要求，應將測試報告逐條映射。奧地利項目業主可能要求提供德語摘要或文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking under EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU; effectively mandatory where ASI, E-Control, APG, or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence; OVE rules apply additionally
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not an Austrian IEC evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Austrian PV inverter EMC as an IEC/EU evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Austria's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage (note: voltage is higher than China's 220/380 V), confirm OVE and APG requirements, and verify any Austrian project-owner EMC requirements before shipment. German-language documentation may be required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 奥地利光伏逆变器EMC应按IEC/欧盟证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在奥地利230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性（注：电压高于中国220/380 V），确认OVE和APG要求，并在出货前核实奥地利项目业主EMC要求。可能需要德语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奧地利光伏逆變器EMC應按IEC/歐盟證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在奧地利230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性（注：電壓高於中國220/380 V），確認OVE和APG要求，並在出貨前核實奧地利項目業主EMC要求。可能需要德語文件。
